name: Stonedeep
short_description: Stonedeep is an 2.5D underground city builder. Dwarfs gather resources, build and fend off monsters. Colonies can specialize in culture, production, military and trading. At start, dwarfs need drinks and rest. With a higher civilization level, they will increase their needs.
detailed_description:
Short description

Stonedeep is an 2.5D underground city builder. Dwarfs gather resources, build and fend off monsters. Colonies can specialize in culture, production, military and trading. At start, dwarfs need drinks and rest. With a higher civilization level, they will increase their needs.


About the Game

Dig tunnels and grow your empire


Dig into the ground and find resources to build and grow your kingdom. The more your civilization grows, the further you have to spread your tunnels.

Seasons



Your dwarfs have to survive different seasons with different weather.

Level up your resident's civilization levels


Currently, Stonedeep has nine civilization levels. Every civilization level increases your daily tax income, but also increases the needs of the involved residents. In Stonedeep similar to the real world there is a limited amount of gold coins (money). You have to spend your money to get it back from your residents.

Current Status

Stonedeep currently includes over 80 resources, 5 different biomes, over 70 buildings, 9 civilization levels, and 8 types of adversaries with different variations and 4 animals.

Early Access - what's done & what's to come - September 2021

All 4 planned milestones were added between September 2020 and September 2021. At the moment, we are working on improving the performance and eliminating all bugs that are still present.
